From: "John Amerling" <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
Date: Fri, 18 Apr 2008 18:42:12 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Amy on board on further limiting of ACOE permit. Still waiting for contact
back from Alan Smith. By the way, LSJ was ripped by the audience at the
hearing last night for Thatch key. Essentially the statements were that LSJ
gets permits and then does what it wants. Amy can give you more detail since
she is on that team. 

 

SANFORD, AMERLING & ASSOCIATES
